name: Flintshire (United Kingdom)
description: A white field with a black cross overall, charged with black birds (choughs) from the historic arms of Flint.
history: Recognised by the Flag Institute as the flag of the historic county of Flintshire; the design draws on the arms of the medieval lordship.

features.symbolism: from the historic arms of the lordship of Flint

features.role: choughs from the arms of Flint
